title: Fractional Head of AI
tagline: Senior AI leadership without the full-time commitment.
description: Embedded strategic and technical AI leadership for startups and growth-stage companies that need direction, decision-making, and execution — but aren't ready to hire a full-time Head of AI. I work across strategy, architecture, team building, and board-level communication.
deliverables: Board and investor communication on AI
idealFor: Seed to Series B companies building AI-forward products

title: Generative AI Strategy
tagline: Model selection, workflow architecture, and evaluation pipelines that actually work in production.
description: End-to-end strategy for generative image and text AI systems: model selection, prompt engineering, LoRA fine-tuning, evaluation design, and production deployment. Covers both frontier models (ChatGPT-Image, NanoBanana 2) and fine-tuned workflows (Flux, Stable Diffusion).
deliverables: LoRA training strategy and data curation
idealFor: Companies building generative AI into their core product

title: AI Agent Architecture
tagline: Agentic systems designed to run reliably — not just impressively.
description: Design and build production-grade AI agent workflows: system prompt engineering, RAG pipelines, LLM API integration, LangSmith evaluation, prompt versioning, and model benchmarking for latency/cost trade-offs. The goal is agents that work consistently, not just ones that demo well.
idealFor: Teams building autonomous workflows or AI-powered product features

title: AI Art Direction & Style Consulting
tagline: Where art history meets generative AI — systematic style and model fine-tuning.
description: Consulting for creators, studios, and product teams who need a systematic approach to AI visual output. I bring a deep background in art history and art movements — 300+ published articles on achieving specific styles with generative AI — combined with hands-on expertise in prompt engineering, LoRA fine-tuning, and model selection. My engagement with art isn't only digital: I founded Satori Gallery in Batesville, AR, where I've created 20 large-format original musician portraits that also function as DML flat-panel speakers — building actual art objects, not just directing models. The result is a repeatable system for consistent, directed visual output rather than lucky generation.
deliverables: Style guide and prompt vocabulary for your aesthetic
Model and workflow selection for your use case
LoRA fine-tuning strategy and training oversight
Art direction frameworks for creative teams
idealFor: Creative studios, AI art platforms, and product teams with strong visual identity requirements

title: Specification Engineering Workshop
tagline: Stop giving your AI agents vague instructions. Build specs that actually run.
description: A structured working session based on the Specification Engineering framework — the Five Pillars methodology for turning rough requirements into production-grade agent specifications. Teams leave with a complete specification for their highest-priority AI workflow and the tools to write the next ones independently.
deliverables: Live spec-writing session for your priority workflow
Complete .md specification file ready for agent execution
Team training on the Five Pillars methodology
idealFor: Engineering and product teams deploying AI agents who keep getting wrong outputs

title: AI Audit & Advisory
tagline: Your AI isn't working as expected. Let's find out why.
description: A focused diagnostic engagement for companies whose AI implementations aren't delivering. I audit the full stack — model selection, prompt design, evaluation approach, data quality, and architecture — identify root causes, and deliver a clear remediation plan. No vague recommendations; specific fixes with rationale.
idealFor: Companies with underperforming AI features or failed agent deployments
